response.text:
# REFLECTION

Household r1c1 remains in critical islanded emergency with SoC at 10% and approximately 13 minutes to complete battery depletion. The cluster-wide synchronized battery failure has created a cascade of mutual rejections across all peers, each protecting their own survival thresholds while inbound requests flood in from r1c0, r1c2, r2c2, and r4c4. The household has been placed on distrusted_peers lists by multiple neighbors (r0c0, r3c3), further isolating outbound sharing options. All peers are uniformly rejecting outbound transfers citing their own critical SoC levels and islanded conditions. The only viable lifeline is escalation to dr_aggregator for emergency coordinated supply and load-shedding. Resuming any outbound peer-to-peer sharing at this SoC level would accelerate local collapse and violate survival-preservation logic. The household must maintain strict inbound-only mode, reject all outbound requests regardless of urgency, and await aggregator emergency intervention or grid reconnection.

```yaml
sharing_intent: conservative
share_min_soc_frac: 0.0
max_share_kw_per_tick: 0.0
recipient_priority: []
distrusted_peers:
  - r0c0
  - r3c3
request_urgency: urgent
belief_note: "Islanded emergency, SoC 10%, 13 min to depletion. Cluster-wide battery failure. All outbound sharing suspended. Inbound-only mode. Escalating to dr_aggregator for emergency coordinated supply and load-shedding. Will not resume outbound sharing until SoC > 0.60 and grid reconnection confirmed."
ttl_ticks: 13
```

system: You are the planning subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Given recent state, beliefs, and trust circles, output (1) a one-paragraph REFLECTION on what you've observed (just text), and (2) a POLICY in a YAML code-fence — sharing_intent (conservative|balanced|generous), share_min_soc_frac (0..1), max_share_kw_per_tick (kW), recipient_priority (list of {circle, weight}), distrusted_peers (list of house ids), request_urgency (low|normal|urgent), belief_note (string), ttl_ticks (int >= 1).
